subject: Majin Buu in close-up portrait, pink rotund body, antenna, wide grin
description: A large pink rotund figure fills the frame in a close-up. The figure has a broad, flat face with a very wide grin revealing teeth, a stubby antenna or head protrusion on top, and small beady eyes. The skin tone is a solid bubblegum pink. He wears a white vest or robe-like garment with purple trim. Pink steam or vapor rises from his body. The background is dark, suggesting a void or dramatic dark setting. The overall mood reads as ominous despite the figure's cartoonish design.
foreground: Large pink rotund figure with wide grin, antenna, white vest with purple trim, pink vapor rising
background: Dark void with pink vapor wisps
